caption: Two men sit in a room in front of a television and a shelf of media cases. The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt, while the man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace. Behind them, a neon sign on the wall reads "OUR STUPID REACTIONS". The men maintain serious, contemplative facial expressions throughout the sequence, with the man on the right resting his chin on his hand. On the television screen, a scene from a video plays featuring characters in silhouette. Initially, a single figure stands holding a long object. As the sequence progresses, the image on the screen shifts to show two figures engaging in a physical interaction, appearing to clash or hold onto each other. The men in the foreground remain stationary and focused on the screen as the video content changes.
